name: Spinach Madeleine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach as directed on package. Drain well in a colander, reserving 1/4 cup of the liquid.
2. Melt butter and sauté onions until translucent.
3. Add flour, stirring until smooth, do not brown.
4. Reduce heat and add evaporated milk and cheese sauce, stirring until well blended.
5. Add drained spinach and stir.
6. Add spices (black pepper, garlic powder, celery salt) and adjust consistency with the reserved spinach liquid if needed.
7. Optional additions: 1/4 teaspoon liquid crab boil and cooked shrimp can be added. The mixture can also be served in prebaked pastry shells.
